name: Cheese and Herb Spread
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces (120 g) Low fat soft cheese
2 ounces (60 g) mature cheddar cheese, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, mix together the soft cheese and garlic puree if using. Add the cheddar cheese, chives, parsley, and yogurt, beating together until combined. Season with a pinch of black pepper.
2. Use as a spread for bread, crispbread, or pitta bread, or as a topping for toast and grill until bubbling.
3. Keep covered in the fridge and use within 3 days. It may be frozen for up to 3 months.
Preparation time: 10 minutes
Servings: 4
Calories per serving: 115
